summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively from the hydrated preflight artifact. No close, merge, fix, or PR-creation path is safe or permitted for this job. One linked security-sensitive closed PR is quarantined; useful open PRs remain open; linked issues stay open behind their hydrated candidate PRs. One PR needs maintainer API-scope judgment before any merge path.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive linked ref must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling and excluded from backlog cleanup automation.
